metadata_mapping.performers: Not present on sampled pages — parse a[href*='/models/'] if available

search_strategy.notes: Use GET https://www.everydayporn.co/search/?q=<query>; results render in HTML on the first page and are suitable for sceneByName.

anti_bot_or_access_notes: As of May 11, 2026, direct curl/requests traffic receives a Cloudflare managed challenge page while browser traffic succeeds.
Use a Cloudflare-aware HTTP client such as cloudscraper rather than plain requests alone.
Use conservative request delays between search calls.
known_limitations: Performer/model links not present on sampled scene pages.
Studio/source links not confirmed — may not be populated for all content.
Search pagination appears to be AJAX-driven; first-page HTML search is confirmed, deeper paging is not.
Platform appears KVS-like but exact CMS unconfirmed — avoid hardcoding KVS-specific assumptions.
